speaker: charlie
text: G'day folks, welcome to ParkSyde Bright Side, I'm Alex. It's Wednesday, April 22nd - Earth Day 2026 - and we've got some ripper stories to brighten your morning.

speaker: alice
text: And I'm Jamie, thrilled to be here on this special day! Today's all about celebrating the good stuff happening for our planet, and trust me, there's plenty to smile about.

speaker: charlie
text: Too right, mate. From scientists catching nature's secret light shows to communities leading the charge on climate action. Plus we've got a meteor shower peaking tonight that you won't want to miss!
